narrative:
German Twp (precinct in Harrison County) has 492 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
